brand_dna.category: Lingerie, sleepwear and beauty with collagen and hydration-infused bodywear (BODYFUSION) at its center.
brand_dna.core_belief: Léays believes what we wear next to our skin can spark confidence and release the power within - comfort made beautiful, crafted by women, for women.
proof_points: All underwear made with a bamboo blend liner (high percentage bamboo)
BODYFUSION range infused with collagen and body hydration
Refund or exchange offered for change of mind on items in original condition
brand_dna.positioning: Elevated everyday intimates - premium, sensory and self-care led rather than basic or purely functional.

voice_pillars.name: Sensory Self-Care
voice_pillars.desc: Writes about how fabric feels against skin and the private confidence it unlocks.
voice_pillars.quote: designed to make women feel incredible in their own skin

voice_pillars.name: Elevated Comfort
voice_pillars.desc: Frames comfort as something beautiful and refined, not plain or utilitarian.

voice_pillars.name: By Women, For Women
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks as an intimate, knowing insider voice shared between women.

voice_pillars.name: Quietly Confident
voice_pillars.desc: Leans into the private, empowering feeling of what is worn underneath.
voice_pillars.quote: our intimate knowledge gives us an invisible smile

phrases: feel incredible in their own skin
lace lingerie that fits like it should

icp: Women who want everyday intimates and sleepwear that feel luxurious against the skin and quietly boost their confidence, and who are drawn to the added self-care of collagen and hydration-infused wear.

personas.name: The Everyday Indulger
personas.description: Buys elevated basics and BODYFUSION pieces for daily wear; moved by the promise of comfort that feels like self-care she wears all day.

personas.name: The Fit-Frustrated Shopper
personas.description: Wants lingerie that actually fits and stays put; moved by size education, seamfree smoothness and lace that fits like it should.

personas.name: The Gifting Romantic
personas.description: Shopping satin sleepwear or lingerie as a treat or gift; moved by gift wrapping, gift messages and the daring, delicate feel.

offers: Buy 2, Get 1 Free on selected briefs and panties (3 for 2 underwear offer, core styles only)
Gift box add-on ($12.99) with free gift message
Refund or exchange for change of mind or incorrect fit, items in original unworn condition with proof of purchase
Sale pricing across BODYFUSION, Collagen Seamfree and sleepwear ranges

allowed.claim: Made with a bamboo blend liner
Comfort made beautiful with elevated design
Refund or exchange for change of mind or incorrect fit

banned.claim: Collagen wear treats, prevents or reverses wrinkles or aging
banned.why: Disease/condition treatment claim not supported and outside structure/function limits
Unsupported disease/condition claim with no cited study

banned.claim: Clinically proven to firm or hydrate skin
banned.why: 'Clinically proven' banned without a cited study on the site

banned.claim: Visible results in a set number of days or wears
banned.why: Guaranteed results and specific timelines to a health outcome are banned
Disease/condition claim outside allowed structure/function language
